title: Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace Scrapbook
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Youmay|the scrapbook|[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (disambiguation)|other things related to ''The Phantom Menace'']]}} {{Book |not_appearance=1 |image=[[File:Phantom_Menace_scrapbook.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace Scrapbook'' |author=[[Ryder Windham]] |cover artist=*[[David Stevenson]] {{C|interior design}} *[[Alice Alfonsi]] {{C|photo and text editing}} *[[Susan Lovelace]] {{C|art direction}} |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=*[[Random House]] {{C|US}} *[[Scholastic]] {{C|UK}} |early release= |release date=[[April]], [[1999]]{{RandomHouseOld|url=kids/catalog/display.pperl?isbn=0375800085|text=Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace Movie Scrapbook}} |intl release= |rereleased= |media type= |pages=64 |isbn=0-375-80008-5 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline= |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace Scrapbook''''' is a [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] children's reference book that serves as the "Ultimate Insider's Guide" to the [[prequel trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. The book was written by [[Ryder Windham]] and published by [[Random House]] in [[April]], [[1999]]. {{Book-stub}} ==Publisher's summary== ''Welcome to the beginning.''
''Not so long ago, in a galaxy we call home... George Lucas created STAR WARS, the most popular and successful film series of all time.''
''Now comes the very first installment of this thrilling and imaginative saga,'' ''Episode I'' The Phantom Menace.
''Packed with over 100 photos, this scrapbook is your insider's guide to the fantastic wonders of Episode I.''
''Get the facts behind the major characters, planets, weapons, aliens, ships, vehicles, and droids featured in the film.''
''Discover fascinating details, meet the stellar cast, and even take a peek behind the scenes of this unforgettable epic adventure.'' ==Contents== *Introduction: Episode I - The Beginning *I. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] *II. The [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] *III. The [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] *IV. The [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo]] *V. The [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] *VI. [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] *VII. [[Droid/Legends|Droids]] *VIII. [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] *IX. [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace#Credits|The Cast]] *X.
